description.overview: The Rat Terrier is an American farm dog bred to control vermin, valued for its intelligence and versatility.
description.temperament: Rat Terriers are intelligent, loving, and lively. They bond closely with family and are good with children.
description.health: Generally healthy. May be prone to patellar luxation and hip dysplasia.
description.exercise: Moderate to high energy. Need daily exercise and mental stimulation.

not_for: Those wanting a calm lap dog
First-time owners wanting an easy dog
verdict.summary: Versatile American farm dogs with loving personalities. Rat Terriers are intelligent, family-friendly, and adaptable to various living situations.
